---
title: "Guidethrough: Bacen API"
format: 
  gfm: default
editor: source
---

<!--------------->
<!--- Summary --->
<!--------------->

## Briefing
<p>
|       This repository is a useful tool that helps accessing Brazil Central Bank^[https://www.ipeadata.gov.br/Default.aspx] databases through its API. Further details are available here:

|       Readme - User Guide [en-us](readme_en_us.md)
|       Leiame - Manual [pt-br](readme_pt_br.md)
</p>
